channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped office chair, 7th May
item.description:
Blue plastic office chair flytipped, obstruction to pedestrians on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Turf dumped on road, 7th May
item.description:
Turf dumped on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21A, Scott's Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very long grass, 7th May
item.description:
The grass needs cutting by the recycling bins at Carlton Parade opposite Priory Gardens and there is also a dumped looks like a metal item in the grass which needs removing. This area seems to just be a dumping ground when the recycling and clothes bins are not emptied on a regular basis. The whole area around Carlton Parade shops needs a regular street cleaner. Thank you .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin men behaviour, 7th May
item.description:
2 issues. The second time in the row the bin men have just thrown our bin back in the middle of our pathway which is most unhelpful, I do appreciate they are moving quickly but it's not helpful. Biggest issue is the emptying number 15's bin and bag split and as you can see rather than clean up he just left it in the road. Totally unacceptable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11B, Page Heath Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poster tube in road, 7th May
item.description:
There's been a squashed cardboard poster tube in the road by the mini roundabout for several weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip wheelbarrow, 7th May
item.description:
Please remove fly tip of wheel barrow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunnington Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden pallet dumped, 7th May
item.description:
Pallet behind green telecoms box at junction near mini roundabout, start of Kent House Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 7th May
item.description:
Damaged, left here for months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Mothers Square, Hackney, London

item.title: Abandoned car, 7th May
item.description:
Car damaged and unlocked. Has been here for months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Mothers Square, Hackney, London

Fly tip

item.title: Street light out, 7th May
item.description:
Street light not been working for a few days.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 7th May
item.description:
The public bin by the back of Kent House station is full and overflowing with dog waste bags etc and someone has dumped a black coat next to it, too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolly paint and rubbish against wall under fly tipping sign opposite 88 Barth road, 7th May
item.description:
This has been there about 2 weeks and people keep adding to it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Children’s trampoline flytipped, 7th May
item.description:
Please remove fly tip.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widecombe Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 pot hole o/s 114 - 116 Old Farm Avenue, 7th May
item.description:
There are 2 potholes o/s 114 -116 Old Farm Avenue. These have been fixed 2 times now but need fixing again. It is also keeping residents awake as the cars drive over it. Please can this be fixed properly asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree uprooted blocking footpath, 7th May
item.description:
Tree uprooted blocking footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Woodlea Drive, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous dumping of rubbish bags by the bins outside 28 Ivanhoe, 7th May
item.description:
There are always excess bags and rubbish placed next, but not in, the bins. These get broken into by foxes and then rubbish gets strewn down the street. This is an ongoing problem of flytipping outside this house.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26-28, Ivanhoe Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish blocking pavement, 7th May
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for a few days and is blocking the pathway for people with pushchairs and disabled people

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox near the church back garden, 7th May
item.description:
We found the fox dead on the road near the church about 2 weeks ago. It was put in a bin bag and given placed in the back garden of the church. Near the bins
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 7th May
item.description:
This rubbish its getting bigger and bigger right next to my shop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
